parameters.query:
SELECT c.*, p.auto_publish, p.quality_threshold, p.max_revise_count
FROM chapters c
JOIN projects p ON c.project_id = p.id
WHERE c.id = $1;

SELECT * FROM chapter_versions
WHERE chapter_id = $1
ORDER BY version_number DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT * FROM agent_reviews
WHERE chapter_id = $1
ORDER BY created_at DESC;

SELECT * FROM generation_jobs
WHERE chapter_id = $1
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO chapter_versions (chapter_id, project_id, version_number, version_type, title, body_markdown, summary, word_count, model_provider, created_by_agent, change_log)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, 'revised', $4, $5, $6, $7, 'claude', 'revision_writer', $8)
RETURNING id;

UPDATE chapters
SET body_markdown = $5, title = $4, summary = $6, word_count = $7,
    current_version_id = (SELECT id FROM chapter_versions WHERE chapter_id = $1 ORDER BY version_number DESC LIMIT 1),
    status = 'revised', updated_at = now()
WHERE id = $1;

UPDATE generation_jobs
SET revise_count = revise_count + 1, status = 'reviewing', updated_at = now()
WHERE id = $9;

messages.content: 你是 safety_reviewer。只输出合法 JSON。对章节进行安全审查，检查是否有密钥泄露、版权问题、平台禁止内容。blocking issue：出现密钥、连接字符串、token、版权抄袭、违法内容。

parameters.query:
UPDATE chapters SET status = $2, updated_at = now() WHERE id = $1;
UPDATE generation_jobs SET status = $2, updated_at = now() WHERE id = $3;
